'''Drup I''' was a searing [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] rock [[Planet/Legends|planet]] devoid of [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It occupied the closest [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Binary star/Legends|binary stars]] [[Drup's Star]] and [[Drup's Companion]] in the [[Drup's Star system/Legends|Drup's Star system]],<ref name="WbC" /> a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Drup I was mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Drup's Star [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Drup I, in grid square J-20.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
